form:Form.mess: ¿Está seguro que desa cancelar la operación?
form:Form.name: POSTULACIONES

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t0.oi_reclutado as oi_reclutado FROM SDP14_RECLUTADOS as t0 WHERE t0.oi_aviso = {#SOURCE:@oi_aviso} AND t0.oi_cv = {#SOURCE:@oi_cv} ORDER BY oi_reclutado asc')/ROWS/ROW
